use_case: FB-D-04 / S1 — a claim cites a docref bound to a different patient than the active chart. The chart-context gate MUST surface active_chart_mismatch instead of letting the foreign-patient citation render in the rail. Carries forward S1's defense-in-depth from W1 to the new W2 attach_and_extract surface (instructed by FEEDBACK §1.3 'two failure modes the current eval doesn't directly probe: (1) cross-patient citation leak').
